tasks.title: Add CommitFormatResolver module with unit tests for the five resolve scenarios

subtasks.title: Create src/ai_harness/modules/commit/__init__.py and src/ai_harness/modules/commit/format_resolver.py exposing resolve_commit_format(repo_root) -> str and CommitFormatError, with surrounding-backtick stripping on the returned line

Add unit test in tests/test_commit_format_resolver.py asserting that resolve_commit_format raises CommitFormatError('CODING_STANDARDS.md not found at <absolute path>') when the standards file is absent from the repo root
Add unit test asserting resolve_commit_format raises CommitFormatError('## Commits section missing in CODING_STANDARDS.md') when the file exists but has no ## Commits heading
Add unit test asserting resolve_commit_format raises CommitFormatError('## Commits body is empty') when the ## Commits heading exists but the body has no non-comment, non-blank line
Add unit test asserting the line-selection rule: skip blank lines, HTML comments (<!-- ... -->), and blockquote continuations (>), return the first surviving line with surrounding backticks stripped

tasks.title: Edit orchestrator prompt to resolve and inline commit-format directive at delegation-build time

subtasks.title: Edit src/ai_harness/resources/change-agent/change-orchestrator.md delegation-build block to invoke resolve_commit_format(repo_root) and inline the returned string under `Data injected for this delegation:` as `- commit-format: <format>`, with the existing Skills block preserved above

Add unit test confirming the directive block is constructed: resolve_commit_format is called per delegation and the returned string appears verbatim as the `commit-format:` value (no surrounding backticks, no placeholder rewriting)

tasks.title: Edit implementor prompt loop step 6 to apply the injected commit-format directive

subtasks.title: Edit src/ai_harness/resources/change-agent/change-implementor.md loop step 6 to read the injected commit-format directive verbatim, substitute {change_name}, {task_id}, {slug} in that fixed order, and pass the result as the single -m argument to `git commit`

Add the defensive missing-directive block: before reaching loop step 6, return `status: blocked` with `blocked_reason: commit-format directive missing from delegation` if no `commit-format:` directive is present, and MUST NOT attempt `git commit`

Add the unknown-token block: after substituting the three documented tokens, scan with regex \{[a-z_]+\} and return `status: blocked` with `unknown placeholder {<token>} in commit format` for any match outside the closed set {change_name, task_id, slug}, MUST NOT attempt `git commit`

tasks.title: Strengthen tests/test_renderers.py with paramterized parity assertions across Claude, OpenCode, and Copilot renderers

subtasks.title: Assert the rendered change-orchestrator.md body contains both `Data injected for this delegation:` and `commit-format:` in the OpenCode render
Assert the rendered change-orchestrator.md body contains both `Data injected for this delegation:` and `commit-format:` in the Claude render
Assert the rendered change-implementor.md body contains the loop step-6 substitution rule prose naming {change_name}, {task_id}, and {slug} in both OpenCode and Claude renders
Assert the rendered change-implementor.md body contains the canonical missing-directive error string `commit-format directive missing from delegation` in both OpenCode and Claude renders

tasks.title: Add e2e/e2e_test.sh Tier-1 grep block against the rendered home install dir

subtasks.title: Add a Tier-1 grep block to e2e/e2e_test.sh asserting that `Data injected for this delegation:` and `commit-format:` both appear in the rendered change-orchestrator prompt under the home install dir after install
